column18: Welcome to the tenth and final day of the study on social behavior     Today, you will play more games with different virtual partners. These “virtual partners” are not real people but are programs that can simulate real-life behavior, just like characters in videogames. In each game you will be matched with another virtual partner who behaves independently, so you will never play with the same virtual partner twice. You will have to make decisions that affect the payoff of yourself and the virtual partner.      Participation in this study is still voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time, but you will only be compensated if you complete the entire study (i.e., all 10 days). After completing the entire study, you will receive a fixed compensation of 7.5 pounds and you will receive an additional bonus payment based on your performance of one of the games per day (these games will be chosen at random).     To get further instructions about the study, please check the box 'Read, understood and approved' below, and then click on the next button. By checking this box, you indicate that you have read, understood and approved this statement and are over the age of 18.

column131: Thanks for your help. Please read the instructions and write your comments in the box below.       You are now matched with a group and will begin the game when everyone is ready.     There are 4 people (3 others + you) in your group.     What happens during each game?     At the start of each game, everyone will receive 10 tokens.    Everyone will make a decision to give some of their tokens to a common pot. These decisions are all made at the same time.     Every point that is donated to the common pot after everyone makes their decision is multiplied by 1.6, and redistributed equally between the players.     Example: if everybody donates all their tokens to the common pot, these 40 tokens are multiplied to 64, so everyone gets 16 tokens.     However, if you donate 0 tokens and the other players all donate all their tokens, the common pot after multiplication contains 48 tokens. And you will end up with 22 tokens in total.     Thus, no matter what anyone else does, donating nothing always benefits you but decreases group earnings.       Are these instructions clear? Please write your comments below.
